steps.title: Define scope of work
steps.content: To emphasize the scope of Thompson's work, the sentence should highlight the size of his overall artistic output. The key note is that he produced more than two thousand drawings and paintings.

steps.title: Reject narrower focuses
steps.content: B mentions the large output but shifts the main point to Mater's medium. C focuses on auction price and materials. D focuses on timing and sale price. Framing Mater as one work among more than two thousand emphasizes scope. The answer is A.
